word: H5183 - נַחַת - Nachath - nakh'-ath - Lighting down

sections.paragraph:
Original: נחת

Transliteration: nachath

Phonetic: nakh'-ath

BDB Definition:

  1. rest, quietness
    1. quietness, quiet attitude
    2. rest (of death)
  2. descent (of judgment)

Origin: from H5182

TWOT entry: 1323a,1351a

Part(s) of speech: Noun
